ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "wave_height" REAL /* Height of the waves in meters */,
  "wave_period" REAL /* Period of the waves in seconds */,
  "avg_waves_per_second" REAL /* Average number of waves per second */,
  "water_temp" REAL /* Temperature of the water in Celsius */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data collection */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the data was collected */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the water where the data was collected */,
  "salinity" REAL /* Salinity of the water in parts per thousand (ppt) */,
  "dissolved_oxygen" REAL /* Dissolved oxygen in the water in milligrams per liter (mg/L) */,
  "ph_level" REAL /* pH level of the water */,
  "turbidity" REAL /* Turbidity of the water in nephelometric turbidity units (NTU) */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection event */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the device (buoy, sensor, satellite) used to collect the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_records_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_records_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site (e.g., Bay Area, California) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the site */,
  "depth" REAL /* Average depth of the site in meters */,
  "water_type" TEXT /* Type of water body (e.g., ocean, sea, bay) */,
  "eco_region" TEXT /* Ecological region of the site */,
  "last_visited_date" TEXT /* Date of the last visit or data collection at the site */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional description of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection event */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the data was collected */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of data collection (e.g., buoy, sensor, satellite) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date of the data collection */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth at which the data was collected */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the device used to collect the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., buoy, sensor, satellite) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., good, questionable, poor) */,
  "collection_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the collection event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher (e.g., university, research institute) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the researcher */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role assigned to the researcher (linked to `user_roles`) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login to the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the researcher (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record being accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "data_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of data accessed in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES data_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record this metadata refers to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data record */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement (e.g., meters, Celsius) */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag indicating the reliability of the data (e.g., good, questionable) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., buoy, satellite, manual) */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., automated, manual) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., good, questionable, poor) */,
  "collection_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES data_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record this version refers to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding changes made in this version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data record */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version (e.g., major, minor) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the version (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES data_records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition entry */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection event */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during data collection in Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage during data collection */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during data collection in km/h */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure during data collection in hPa */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the wind (e.g., N, NE, E) */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Percentage of cloud cover */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation in millimeters */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in kilometers */,
  "weather_description" TEXT /* Description of the weather conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_conditions_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record being analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., statistical, graphical) */,
  "result" REAL /* Results of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was conducted */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis (e.g., statistical, graphical, machine learning) */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* Tool or software used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the analysis */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the analysis (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES data_records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions assigned to the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role this permission is assigned to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who initiated the export */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the export was performed */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the exported file in bytes */,
  "export_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the export */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the export (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher to whom the notification is sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., data update, system maintenance) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
